# return _items

res = []
for item in _items:
  for query in item["json"]["queryTerms"]:
    res.append({
      "entity": item["json"]["entity"],
      "term": query,
      "sinceUnix": item["json"]["sinceUnix"],
      "ticker": item["json"]["ticker"],
      "frontPagePoints": item["json"]["frontPagePoints"],
      "breakoutThreshold": item["json"]["breakoutThreshold"],
    })

return res
